jobs.title: Controller Medior/ Senior at the intersection of Business & Finance control
jobs.location: 5611 ZS ZS Eindhoven (Noord-Brabant) Netherlands Company address The Swatch Grou
jobs.description: Controller Medior/ Senior at the intersection of Business & Finance control - Swatch Group Controller Medior/ Senior at the intersection of Business & Finance control Bedrijfsintroductie A versatile job where you will balance subject matter between Finance and Business but also be an important point of contact for your team. Swatch Group is the world's number one manufacturer of watches. With 16 watch brands, the Group is represented in all price ranges, additionally active in the production and sale of jewelry, watch developments and components. Swatch Group represents the following watch brands, among others: Breguet, Harry Winston, Blancpain, Glashütte Original, Jaquet Droz, Omega, Longines, Rado, Union Glashütte, Tissot, Balmain, Certina, Mido, Hamilton, Swatch and Flik Flak. The Group has a strong distribution and multi-brand retail network with two sophisticated boutiques under the name Tourbillon and Hour Passion. Swatch Group is a major player in advanced nanomechanical, nanoelectronic and Bluetooth technologies essential for watchmaking and other industries. From our headquarters in Eindhoven, the Netherlands, we supply independent jewelers and chain stores. In addition, The Swatch Group Netherlands has a growing number of its own outlets, such as Swatch Stores, Tissot Boutique and an Hour Passion in the Designer Outlet in Roermond. For the head office in the Netherlands (Eindhoven) we are immediately looking for a: Business/ finance Controller (full-time and on location). Functie As Controller you will be the sparring partner for the Commercial organization and contribute to the further development and professionalization of the Finance team. As Controller you are fully PnL responsible for our B2B business activities and you have an overarching and coordinating role in key processes such as monthly closing, budget and sales forecast. In this role you function as the right hand of the CFO. Key activities and responsibilities: Contribute to our growth strategy by delivering compelling analysis and presentations Provide insight into gross and net margin development Support and advise in the preparation of business cases for the opening of new outlets Reporting forecasts both commercially and financially Active contribution in the monthly closing in cooperation with the other Finance colleagues Preparation of cash flow analyses and projections and capex controlling Presenting the operational and commercial results to the management (CEO & CFO). There are also opportunities, for example, to automate and optimize reporting. We also see opportunities to further improve processes. Profiel Furthermore, do you recognize yourself in; HBO+ or WO educated with at least 3 -5 years of relevant work experience Making clear financial analyses for management to operations A team mentality, but able to work independently Skill in working with various IT systems, such as SAP, SAP BW and Office 365 Good skills in the English language where Dutch is an advantage. You function well in an organization; Which is dynamic. Working ad hoc, prioritizing, switching quickly gives you energy In development. Growth ambition and we work on long-term relationships Where we value work atmosphere and working in the office is the norm Who is Corporate but see a lot of potential in process improvements. Aanbod What will you get from us? The opportunity to work in a growing, international organization in the center of Eindhoven An independent, but certainly also challenging, and versatile position for 40 hours per week A competitive and interesting benefits package, including 26 vacation days based on full-time employment Excellent pension accrual The opportunity to take out collective health insurance through The Swatch Group; Veld 7 Are you excited? Please respond via the application button and we will contact you as soon as possible. Any questions? Please contact Erik van Mullem from the HR department. Mobile: + 31 6 51 23 62 00 Email: erik.vanmullem@nl.swatchgroup.com Job location Kennedyplein 8 5611 ZS ZS Eindhoven (Noord-Brabant) Netherlands Company address The Swatch Group (Netherlands) B.V. P.O. Box 511 / NL-5600 AM Eindhoven NL-5611 ZS Eindhoven Apply for this job Share this job offer

descriptionByLocale.en: Controller Medior/ Senior at the intersection of Business & Finance control - Swatch Group Controller Medior/ Senior at the intersection of Business & Finance control Bedrijfsintroductie A versatile job where you will balance subject matter between Finance and Business but also be an important point of contact for your team. Swatch Group is the world's number one manufacturer of watches. With 16 watch brands, the Group is represented in all price ranges, additionally active in the production and sale of jewelry, watch developments and components. Swatch Group represents the following watch brands, among others: Breguet, Harry Winston, Blancpain, Glashütte Original, Jaquet Droz, Omega, Longines, Rado, Union Glashütte, Tissot, Balmain, Certina, Mido, Hamilton, Swatch and Flik Flak. The Group has a strong distribution and multi-brand retail network with two sophisticated boutiques under the name Tourbillon and Hour Passion. Swatch Group is a major player in advanced nanomechanical, nanoelectronic and Bluetooth technologies essential for watchmaking and other industries. From our headquarters in Eindhoven, the Netherlands, we supply independent jewelers and chain stores. In addition, The Swatch Group Netherlands has a growing number of its own outlets, such as Swatch Stores, Tissot Boutique and an Hour Passion in the Designer Outlet in Roermond. For the head office in the Netherlands (Eindhoven) we are immediately looking for a: Business/ finance Controller (full-time and on location). Functie As Controller you will be the sparring partner for the Commercial organization and contribute to the further development and professionalization of the Finance team. As Controller you are fully PnL responsible for our B2B business activities and you have an overarching and coordinating role in key processes such as monthly closing, budget and sales forecast. In this role you function as the right hand of the CFO. Key activities and responsibilities: Contribute to our growth strategy by delivering compelling analysis and presentations Provide insight into gross and net margin development Support and advise in the preparation of business cases for the opening of new outlets Reporting forecasts both commercially and financially Active contribution in the monthly closing in cooperation with the other Finance colleagues Preparation of cash flow analyses and projections and capex controlling Presenting the operational and commercial results to the management (CEO & CFO). There are also opportunities, for example, to automate and optimize reporting. We also see opportunities to further improve processes. Profiel Furthermore, do you recognize yourself in; HBO+ or WO educated with at least 3 -5 years of relevant work experience Making clear financial analyses for management to operations A team mentality, but able to work independently Skill in working with various IT systems, such as SAP, SAP BW and Office 365 Good skills in the English language where Dutch is an advantage. You function well in an organization; Which is dynamic. Working ad hoc, prioritizing, switching quickly gives you energy In development. Growth ambition and we work on long-term relationships Where we value work atmosphere and working in the office is the norm Who is Corporate but see a lot of potential in process improvements. Aanbod What will you get from us? The opportunity to work in a growing, international organization in the center of Eindhoven An independent, but certainly also challenging, and versatile position for 40 hours per week A competitive and interesting benefits package, including 26 vacation days based on full-time employment Excellent pension accrual The opportunity to take out collective health insurance through The Swatch Group; Veld 7 Are you excited? Please respond via the application button and we will contact you as soon as possible. Any questions? Please contact Erik van Mullem from the HR department. Mobile: + 31 6 51 23 62 00 Email: erik.vanmullem@nl.swatchgroup.com Job location Kennedyplein 8 5611 ZS ZS Eindhoven (Noord-Brabant) Netherlands Company address The Swatch Group (Netherlands) B.V.
